task:
Implement the following plan:

# Fireside Rebrand Plan

## Context

The project's GitHub repo is already named "Fireside" and the README uses the Fireside name, but all internal code, configs, and deployment scripts still use "yankcord" / "Yankcord" / "YANKCORD". This plan renames every occurrence to "fireside" / "Fireside" / "FIRESIDE" for a complete, clean rebrand. The live `server/.env` file is intentionally excluded.

**Scope:** ~38 files + 1 directory rename, ~133 individual edits.

---

## Phase 1: Rust Server (build-critical)

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `server/Cargo.toml` | `name = "yankcord-server"` -> `"fireside-server"` |
| `server/src/main.rs` | Default RUST_LOG `yankcord_server` -> `fireside_server`, startup message `"Yankcord"` -> `"Fireside"` |
| `server/src/routes/embed_routes.rs` | User-agent `YankcordBot/1.0 (+https://yankcord.local)` -> `FiresideBot/1.0 (+https://fireside.local)` (2 occurrences) |

`server/Cargo.lock` will auto-regenerate on `cargo build`.

**Verify:** `cargo build` and `cargo test` in `server/`

## Phase 2: Tauri Config

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `client/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json` | `productName`, `identifier` (`com.yankcord.app` -> `com.fireside.app`), window `title` |

## Phase 3: Tauri Rust - Native Capture Env Vars (27 occurrences across 5 files)

All `YANKCORD_NATIVE_*` -> `FIRESIDE_NATIVE_*` via `replace_all` in each file:

- `client/src-tauri/src/capture/service.rs` (2 vars)
- `client/src-tauri/src/capture/service/native_sender.rs` (15 vars)
- `client/src-tauri/src/capture/service/ffmpeg_ivf_encoder.rs` (3 vars)
- `client/src-tauri/src/capture/service/nvenc_encoder.rs` (2 vars)
- `client/src-tauri/src/capture/service/rtp_sender.rs` (2 vars)

## Phase 4: Client TypeScript & HTML

| File | Changes |
|------|---------|
| `client/index.html` | Title, meta description, noscript text |
| `client/src/stores/settings.ts` | 18 localStorage keys `yankcord_*` -> `fireside_*` |
| `client/src/stores/auth.ts` | 5
